name: Thumbstop Rate
definition_short: Percentage of impressions that became a 3-second video view — measures how effectively an ad stops the scroll in the first moment.
gotchas: Above 40% is excellent; 30–40% very good; 20–30% average; below 20% needs creative rework
Only meaningful for video ad formats — will always show 0% for image ads
notes: Also called hook rate. Computed in the data layer from stored video_3s_views and impressions columns. Displayed as a percentage (already multiplied by 100).
